hyperedges.relation: Synchronized scroll in markdown split mode: Editor orchestrates CodeMirrorView and MarkdownPreview with bidirectional scroll sync
Editor routes rendering to specialized viewer based on FileType enum: text->CodeMirror, image->ImageViewer, pdf->PdfViewer, markdown->CodeMirror+MarkdownPreview, settings->SettingsView
Command palette aggregates and dispatches actions from menuActions and direct handlers into a unified searchable list
Terminal panel manages multiple terminal instances; each instance initializes an xterm Terminal, applies theme from CSS vars via getTerminalTheme, and communicates with Rust backend via invoke/listen
Settings view composes shared UI primitives (SettingRow, CustomSelect, ColorPicker) into Global and Workspace settings forms, both reading/writing to shared settings stores

hyperedges.label: Recursive File Tree Rendering
hyperedges.description: FileTree renders FileTreeNode which recursively renders child FileTreeNodes with InlineInput for editing and FileIcon for icons. IndentGuides provide visual indentation. This forms a recursive tree rendering pattern.

hyperedges.label: Theme Application Pipeline
hyperedges.description: ThemeProvider reads globalSettings.theme, looks up the theme from the themes map, then applies all CSS custom properties to the DOM via applyThemeToDOM. All theme objects (obsidianLime, runeBlue, etc.) conform to ThemeColors type and are registered in the themes Record.

hyperedges.label: Titlebar Composition
hyperedges.description: Titlebar composes MenuBar (for menu navigation) and WindowControls (for minimize/maximize/close) into a custom Tauri titlebar. The data-tauri-drag-region attribute enables native window dragging.

hyperedges.label: CodeMirror Editor Setup Pipeline
hyperedges.description: useCodeMirror creates an EditorView with extensions including language support from getLanguageExtension. It uses Comartment pattern for dynamic reconfiguration of language, theme, and word-wrap. Exposes setContent, setLanguage, setTheme, setWordWrap, getContent, focus controls.

hyperedges.label: File System Operations Pipeline
hyperedges.description: useFileSystem manages the file tree lifecycle: openFolder triggers readDirectory and starts watching; refreshPreservingExpanded preserves expansion state across refreshes; createNewFile/createNewFolder/deletingFile/renameEntry all operate on the tree and persist via Tauri FS APIs. The hook reads workspaceSettings.excludeItems to filter entries.
